title: Create the canonical demo Business Space
leverage: Turns the strongest B2B system into a reusable sales asset.
files_or_assets: Screenshots: command center, ROI, proposal, Night Shift, portal, Vault
expected_outcome: One demo story that can power the landing page, pitch deck, and sales calls.
definition_of_done: 10 screenshot targets captured and linked in the Atlas screenshot board.

title: Package AI Business Space Launch Kit
leverage: Creates a concrete offer from existing features.
files_or_assets: Offer catalog, one-page landing copy, pricing table, CTA
expected_outcome: A sellable offer at setup fee plus monthly tier.
risk: Do not overpromise unsupported autonomous execution.
definition_of_done: Offer has buyer, outcome, scope, pricing, proof, and limits.

title: Turn Smart Solution Plan into a lead magnet
leverage: Converts market curiosity into structured sales conversations.
files_or_assets: Pain point intake, ROI screenshot, proposal excerpt
expected_outcome: A demo CTA: get your AI operating plan.
definition_of_done: Lead magnet flow mapped and paired with follow-up offer.

title: Record Night Shift proof story
leverage: Shows automation as accountable labor, not vague magic.
files_or_assets: Replay, output Vault, worklog, client portal export
expected_outcome: A high-conversion demo for the premium automation SKU.
definition_of_done: Demo includes state transitions and saved outputs.

title: Launch AI Cost and Routing Audit page
leverage: Monetizes the hidden control plane and risk register.
files_or_assets: AI Route diagram, risk register, governance checklist
risk: Avoid exposing provider details or secrets.
definition_of_done: Page explains audit scope, deliverables, and outcomes.

title: Create Proof Vault sample bundle
files_or_assets: Fake client artifact folder, replay, proposal, report, portal
expected_outcome: A client-facing proof demo for agencies.
definition_of_done: Bundle has lineage from source to output to client portal.

title: Define first paid Arsenal listing pattern
leverage: Turns marketplace ambition into a real commerce primitive.
files_or_assets: Public Arsenal page, paid access flow, access grant, payout note
risk: Entitlement and payout UX must be clear.
definition_of_done: One listing can be explained in three screenshots.

title: Recruit five pilot partners
files_or_assets: Partner landing copy, commission policy, dashboard screenshot
expected_outcome: Feedback, referrals, and first revenue conversations.
risk: Finance review and approval rules must be explicit.
definition_of_done: Five outreach messages sent with the same proof bundle.

title: Build founder sales deck from Atlas visuals
leverage: Converts platform complexity into investor and buyer clarity.
files_or_assets: Premium SVGs, offer stack, moat map, dashboard spec
definition_of_done: Deck has problem, platform, proof, offers, revenue, moat, risks.

title: Run direct AI path remediation sprint
leverage: Protects credits, margin, reliability, and enterprise trust.
expected_outcome: Cleaner route policy and safer revenue scaling.
risk: Requires production code changes in a separate safe task.
definition_of_done: Every exception is migrated or documented with owner and reason.
